commands.review_summary:
The branch changes Dependency Guard CI to autoscrub package lockfile-only changes on same-repository PRs with a Git Data API cleanup commit and adds focused script/workflow tests.

PR surface: Tests +123, Config 0, Other +197. Total +320 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a maintainer CI automation feature, not a reported runtime bug. Source inspection shows current main blocks dependency graph changes but does not autoscrub lockfile-only residue.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Needs explicit secops/CODEOWNERS handling for the contents-write `pull_request_target` and branch-mutating automation; no narrow automated repair is identified.

target.title: feat(ci): autoscrub dependency lockfile-only PR changes
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds deterministic autoscrubbing for package lockfile-only PR changes when the PR branch lives in the main OpenClaw repository.
- Restores only changed package lockfiles from the PR base tree using the Git Data API, then creates one narrow cleanup commit: `chore: remove dependency lockfile change`.
- Leaves fork PRs and GitHub push failures blocked with a deterministic comment that explains the exact manual next step.
- Skips autoscrub when any changed `package.json` modifies dependency graph fields, because restoring lockfiles in that case can break frozen installs or dependency semantics.

## User-Facing Comments

This PR adds one success comment and expands the blocked comment:

- `Dependency lockfile changes were removed`: posted after a successful autoscrub commit, listing restored lockfiles, target branch, and cleanup commit SHA.
- `Dependency graph changes are blocked`: explains whether autoscrub was not attempted for an unpushable branch, skipped because manifest dependency graph fields changed, or attempted but rejected by GitHub.

## Security / Automation Notes

- The workflow keeps using trusted base checkout under `pull_request_target`; it does not check out or execute PR-head code.
- `contents: write` is required for the same-repository Git Data API cleanup commit path.
- Autoscrub is limited to same-repository PR heads with a concrete ref and SHA.
- Dependency graph changes remain blocked unless the current head SHA is explicitly authorized through the existing secops override flow.

## Verification

- `node --check scripts/github/dependency-guard.mjs`
- YAML parse for `.github/workflows/dependency-guard.yml`
- `git diff --check`

Focused Vitest note: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/dependency-guard-script.test.ts test/scripts/dependency-guard-workflow.test.ts` hung locally without output in this Codex worktree, matching earlier local runner hangs. CI is the source of truth for those focused tests.
target.author: romneyda
